mapper.select: SELECT M.MEMBER_SEQ , M.MEMBER_ID , M.MEMBER_NAME , M.BIRTH_YMD , M.EMAIL , M.GENDER , M.PHONE , M.MEMBER_PWD , M.ROLE_CODE , M.STATUS , M.CREATE_DT , M.CREATE_ID , M.CREATE_IP , M.MODIFY_DT , M.MODIFY_ID , M.MODIFY_IP FROM MEMBER M WHERE M.MEMBER_SEQ = #{memberSeq}

SELECT M.MEMBER_SEQ , M.MEMBER_ID , M.MEMBER_NAME , M.BIRTH_YMD , M.EMAIL , M.GENDER , M.PHONE , M.MEMBER_PWD , M.ROLE_CODE , M.STATUS , M.CREATE_DT , M.CREATE_ID , M.CREATE_IP , M.MODIFY_DT , M.MODIFY_ID , M.MODIFY_IP FROM MEMBER M WHERE M.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId}
